tiers.tier_1_structural_compliance: strong: validation suite and 45-test regression suite pass
tiers.tier_2_output_quality: moderate-to-strong for implementation-aware routes, weaker for judgment-heavy communication routes
tiers.tier_3_designer_outcome: open: no real-world outcome claim made

current_claim_boundary: DesignPilot can claim structured, internally validated, implementation-aware output quality for tested tasks. It cannot yet claim production outcome proof.
